name: Vennio
description: Scheduling infrastructure for developers and AI agents. Query real availability across multiple calendars, create bookings, and negotiate meeting times via REST API and MCP.

skills.name: Find Mutual Availability
skills.description: Query open slots across multiple calendars simultaneously with consent-scoped access for multi-party scheduling.

skills.name: Create Booking
skills.description: Create confirmed calendar bookings with event creation and confirmation emails in a single API call, including Stripe payment support.

skills.name: Manage Venn Links
skills.description: Create and manage shareable booking pages programmatically, enabling AI agents to generate scheduling links on behalf of users.
